title: Baal Veer
desc: Meher starts to get frustrated with her hair and its abilities. As she expresses her agony, Daittya Rani decides to visit her and threatens to make her disappear forever. Can Baalveer save her?

title: Baal Veer
desc: Rani Pari mistakenly takes away Baalveer's powers as she believes it is Bhargav who is causing trouble. Will she realise before it is too late?

title: Baal Veer
desc: Daittya Rani decides to abduct Meher and cut her hair. Meanwhile, the fairies start to panic as they realise Daittya Pari is back and seeking revenge.

title: Baal Veer
desc: Rani Pari figures out that it was Dooba Dooba who helped Bhargav escape. How long will it take for her to realize the truth?
